title: Work Grill fork: root CONTEXT.md creation causes split-brain glossary
description: grill-with-docs CONTEXT-FORMAT.md says "If neither exists, create a root CONTEXT.md lazily when the first term is resolved" and "One CONTEXT.md at the repo root." An .excn Instance has no root CONTEXT.md, so the skill creates a second glossary at root, blind to .excn/CONTEXT.md.
notes: Catalog evidence from the EXEC-006 scratch run (npx to-execution@0.2.2, 2026-06-07); acceptance criteria deferred to the EXEC-007 design grill; direction ruled: fork, stamped per-Instance. Resolution implemented under EXEC-007; stays open, closes when EXEC-007 ships. Closed 2026-06-07 (sprint_2): resolution shipped inside execution-grill-with-docs (EXEC-007, item S2-1).
